subject: Re: For Jeffrey
body:
yes one on one

----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Wednesday, January 30, 2008 11:12:51 AM
Subject: FW: For Jeffrey



-----Original Message-----
From: Adam Bly [mailto:bly@seedmediagroup.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, January 30, 2008 2:08 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: For Jeffrey

Hi Jeffrey,

I just got back from Davos and spent a day in Lausanne at EPFL with
Henry
Markram, Director of the Blue Brain Project (cover of the latest Seed).
We
were pitching PLA.NET (our new technology platform for research
scientists)
to Henry, it went very well, and Blue Brain will now be an initial test
client. Separately, we discussed Henry's fundraising activities for the
project. In a nutshell, this is the next Human Genome Project -- a
massive,
global undertaking to build a brain using supercomputers. IBM is heavily
invested in the project. And Henry is one of the most impressive
scientists
I have ever met. Henry is meeting with potential donors around the
world. He
is coming to New York on Feb 18 and I am putting together a dinner and
some
meetings for him. Would you be interested in meeting him?

Adam
body_html:
yes one on one

Adam
